If the marks of any girl is at most double the marks of any boy, but not less than the marks of any boy, then the number of possible distinct integer values of the total marks of 2 girls and 6 boys is

Correct answer: A
Solution

(a)

Q4 Not checked
General Aptitude • ELECTRICAL ENGINEERING • Expert • +1 / -0.33
Not attempted

Based on the given paragraph, identify the meaning of the word stalking in the context of this paragraph : I once saw a lioness stalking a 3 month old kid. The ground was very open and the kid saw the lioness while she was still some distance away and started bleating whereon the lioness gave up her stalk and walked straight up to it.

Correct answer: D
Solution

(d)
Stalking here refers to a silent approach of the lioness towards the 3 month old kid. She straight away walked up to the kind once the kid started crying (bleating) giving up all caution.

Correct answer: B
Solution

(b)

Q15 Not checked
Technical • MECHANICAL ENGINEERING • +1 / -0.33
Not attempted

Match List-I (Milling Machine) with List-II (significance)

Correct answer: A
Solution

(a)
• Vertical milling machine → It is possible to machine dovetail recesses.
• Planner milling machine → Provided with several horizontal and vertical heads.
• Universal milling machine → It is possible to swivel work table through an angle of ±45° in horizontal plane.
• Rotary milling machine → Motion imparted to work is rotary.

Q34 Not checked
Technical • MECHANICAL ENGINEERING • +1 / -0
Not attempted

Which of the following is/are drawing defects?

Correct answer: N/A
Solution

(a, d)
• Drawing defects are:
1. Centre line crack.
2. Seams : Longitudinal scratches or folds in the material.
• Misrun is a casting defect.
• Alligatoring is a rolling defect.
